variant.doc: Grid variant: 'regular' (uniform lon/lat) or 'reduced_gaussian' (per-row nlon, optional Gaussian-quadrature latitudes).

nlon.doc: Cells in longitude (required for variant=regular; forbidden for variant=reduced_gaussian).

nlat.doc: Cells in latitude (required for variant=regular; for variant=reduced_gaussian defaults to len(nlon_per_row)).

nlon_per_row.doc: Length-nlat array of per-row longitude cell counts. Required for variant=reduced_gaussian; forbidden for variant=regular.

lat_edges.doc: Length-(nlat+1) strictly-increasing latitude cell edges in [-pi/2, pi/2]. Defaults to equal-angle edges when omitted. For production reduced-Gaussian grids, supply the Gaussian-quadrature-derived edges explicitly.

lat_centers.doc: Length-nlat latitude cell centers. Defaults to midpoints of lat_edges.

lon_start.doc: Starting longitude edge (default: -pi, i.e. the [-pi, pi) convention).

dtype.doc: Element precision: 'float64' or 'float32'. Cross-binding conformance is only promised at float64.

pole_policy.doc: Polar-singularity handling: 'none' (boundary cells have no N/S neighbor — the only implemented policy in this phase), 'average' or 'fold' (declared but not implemented; build will error).
